positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of an enchanted forest canopy. Focus on glowing, oversized botanicals (moonflowers, fern fronds, ethereal vines) intertwined with subtle, abstract constellation patterns. The composition must be centered and robustly graphic. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern vector illustration with strong linework. Color Palette: Deep midnight indigo and navy blue gradients contrasted with vivid bioluminescent teals, emerald greens, and soft golds. The lighting should mimic a bioluminescent source, providing excellent contrast and clear, clean silhouettes suitable for direct apparel printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low contrast, bad composition, grain, noise, low detail, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, mutations, realistic photo, ugly
